title: Admission Process – BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women
text:
Admission Process – BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women
Skip to content
Admission Process
Rank Analysis of TG EAPCET 2025-26
“One of the very important characteristics of a student is to question. Let the students ask questions.”
― A. P. J. Abdul Kalam
BVRIT-H develops the students by teaching her the very basics of respective domains.
The procedure for application in our courses is also very basic and clear.
How to apply
Category – A Seats will be filled by the Convener, TSEAMCET Admissions.
Category – B Seats will be filled by the College as per the guidelines of the TSCHE.
When to apply?
After the notification released by TSEAMCET for convener seats and TSCHE for B-category seats.
Can I apply online?
Yes, you can apply online for Category A sears through Convener- TSEAMCET and for Category B seats through the college website.
Where should I post the form?
Form will be available in Admissions tab when the notification is given by TSCHE.
How long should I wait to get the reply?
Complete schedule will be given by TSCHE.
Can I re-apply?
Not required.
How do I know whether I will get admission or not?
You can check the last year (2023-24) EAMCET category wise rank details by clicking the following link.
TS EAMCET – 2023-24 Ranks
“Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.”
― SenecA
Prerequisites
At BVRIT-H we develop our students to become the leaders in their respective domains. This process of overall development has some pre-requisite verticals.
10 + 2 MPC as major subjects.
60% Minimum Marks
TS EAMCET SELECTION CRITERIA
